title: Real AZ Classification by s minus Delta
summary: For real Altland-Zirnbauer symmetry classes, the classification of topological defects depends only on the single congruence class s - delta = s - d + D modulo 8; source anchor: Fully gapped free fermion systems and topological defects / Topological defects (lines 1997-2013).
assumptions: Scope: real AZ classes and the strong topologies emphasized in the early Section III defect discussion.
This child records the dependence on s - delta, not the later homotopy or Clifford-algebra derivation.
regime: Promoted from AITP topic chiu-classification-topological-quantum-matter-symmetries-1505-03535 via candidate candidate:real-az-classification-by-s-minus-delta after passing the documented AI coverage and consensus gate.
scope: Can the paper's real-class defect-classification dependence on s - delta modulo 8 be promoted as a reusable theorem card?
